Why It Matters: The core benchmark value requires monetary data.
Suggested Action: Collect total value, annual fee, or mark as unavailable with source note.
Rule / Evidence: Annual Fee or Total Value + Length

Why It Matters: Annualized values require contract length.
Suggested Action: Collect start/end years or contract length.

Check Item: Currency and FX factor are available
Why It Matters: Cross-country comparison requires standardized currency.
Suggested Action: Enter original currency and FX to base currency.

Why It Matters: Venue size is a basic comparability variable.
Suggested Action: Collect official or typical event capacity.

Check Item: Annual attendance or event activity is available
Why It Matters: Facility performance helps compare exposure and usage.
Suggested Action: Collect annual attendance, event days, or both.

Why It Matters: Market size and purchasing power are important contextual data.
Suggested Action: Collect city/metro population, income, GDP/GRP, tourism if possible.

Check Item: Media and digital indicators are available
Why It Matters: Exposure-related data improves business interpretation.
Suggested Action: Collect broadcast viewers, media mentions, social impressions, search interest where feasible.

Why It Matters: Dataset should be auditable and defensible.
Suggested Action: Add Source ID and direct URL for each important figure.
Rule / Evidence: Source ID + Source URL not blank

Why It Matters: Very large or unusual deals can distort analysis.
Suggested Action: Flag bundled sponsorships, new-venue premium, or local strategic deals.
Rule / Evidence: Special Factors / Notes populated when needed

Why It Matters: Peer grouping supports later benchmarking and sensitivity checks.
Suggested Action: Assign a manual comparable venue group after collecting enough rows.

Why It Matters: For regional/local rows, confirm Country, Region, and Subregion are filled where available.
Suggested Action: Required

Why It Matters: Confirm Data Type / Value Basis is not blank for Asia rows.
Suggested Action: Required
Rule / Evidence: Use dropdown; distinguish actual disclosed vs estimate vs public offering price

Why It Matters: Confirm Tax Treatment is captured for Japan and other tax-sensitive sources.
Suggested Action: Recommended
Rule / Evidence: Use source notes; do not assume gross/net

Why It Matters: Confirm Rights Type and Naming Scope are captured to avoid mixing full-venue deals with sub-facility or bundle deals.
Suggested Action: Required
Rule / Evidence: Use Rights Type and Naming Scope fields

Why It Matters: Preserve original source title and language for non-English data.
Suggested Action: Recommended
Rule / Evidence: Use Original Language Source Title and Original Language fields

Why It Matters: Flag disclosed range, annual-only, total-only, N/A, DND, and estimates using Value Disclosure Status.
Suggested Action: Required
Rule / Evidence: Do not force undisclosed values into numeric fields

Notes: Add details to Regional Data Notes
